task_tokens_consumed: Does any 2024-2026 paper use Latin-square / BIBD scheduling for LLM training mini-batches?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Choosing examples to compose batches for variance reduction.
Latin-square used to test model variations not training data composition.
Selecting representative subset of data per batch.

landscape_completeness_claim: Four clusters cover curriculum, batch composition, Latin-square ML usage, and active/coreset selection.
